activityFeed.message: ✅ DELIVERY COMPLETE! All 16 deliverables ready for review.
🔴 Performance: Memory leak + connection pool issues found in endurance test.
✅ API: 20/20 tests designed. Security scenarios cover OWASP Top 10.
✅ Mobile: Appium framework with real device cloud integration ready.
✅ Web: 24 E2E cases + Playwright POM framework + cross-browser matrix.

communicationLog.message: 📦 DELIVERY COMPLETE! The Testing Family has delivered all 16 comprehensive testing artifacts for app.vwo.com. Review the DELIVERY_MANIFEST.md for full details.
⚡ Found critical issues in endurance testing: 1) Memory leak in CampaignCacheManager (~7MB/min growth). 2) Connection pool exhaustion at 4 hours. Recommend fixes before production load.
📮 All API security scenarios documented. REST Assured framework ready for CI integration. Rate limiting, CORS, SQLi, XSS all covered.
📱 Mobile deliverables ready. Remember: /login direct URL still broken from smoke test. Also found 15/16 touch targets below WCAG threshold. Fix needed.
🕸️ Web testing suite complete. Playwright config supports 5 browsers in parallel. All 24 E2E cases mapped to P0/P1/P2 priorities. Ready for CI.

crossAgentAlerts.message: 🔴 Memory leak in CampaignCacheManager — heap grows 7MB/min during endurance test. Fix: implement LRU + TTL.
🔴 Connection pool exhaustion after 4 hours. Fix: add close() in DAO exception paths.
🐛 /login direct URL broken — returns empty page instead of login form
⚠️ 15/16 touch targets below WCAG 44x44px threshold on mobile
